title: Paris Romantic Getaway
text: Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Seine river cruise, Montmartre walking tour. Best visited Apr-Jun or Sep-Oct. Average hotel $150-300/night.

title: Tokyo Adventure
text: Shibuya crossing, Tsukiji fish market, Senso-ji temple, Akihabara electronics district, teamLab exhibits. Best visited Mar-May or Oct-Nov. Average hotel $100-250/night.

title: Cancun Beach Escape
text: All-inclusive resorts, Chichen Itza day trip, snorkeling at Isla Mujeres, cenote swimming. Best visited Dec-Apr. Average hotel $120-350/night.

title: Bali Wellness Retreat
text: Ubud rice terraces, Tanah Lot temple, surf lessons in Kuta, spa treatments, monkey forest. Best visited Apr-Oct. Average hotel $60-200/night.

title: New York City Explorer
text: Statue of Liberty, Central Park, Broadway shows, Times Square, Brooklyn Bridge walk, world-class dining. Average hotel $200-400/night.

title: Barcelona Culture & Coast
text: Sagrada Familia, Park Guell, La Rambla, Gothic Quarter, Barceloneta beach, tapas crawl. Best visited May-Jun or Sep-Oct. Average hotel $120-280/night.

title: London Royal Experience
text: Buckingham Palace, Tower of London, British Museum, West End theatre, Camden Market, Hyde Park, afternoon tea. Best visited May-Sep. Average hotel $150-350/night.

title: Seattle Pacific Northwest
text: Pike Place Market, Space Needle, Museum of Pop Culture, coffee culture, Olympic Sculpture Park, ferry to Bainbridge Island. Best visited Jun-Sep. Average hotel $120-280/night.

title: Rome Eternal City
text: Colosseum, Vatican Museums, Sistine Chapel, Trevi Fountain, Roman Forum, pasta and gelato tours, Trastevere nightlife. Best visited Apr-Jun or Sep-Oct. Average hotel $120-300/night.

title: Dubai Luxury & Adventure
text: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, desert safari, Palm Jumeirah, Gold Souk, Dubai Marina, indoor skiing. Best visited Nov-Mar. Average hotel $100-500/night.

title: Sydney Harbour City
text: Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge climb, Bondi Beach, Taronga Zoo, Blue Mountains day trip, Darling Harbour. Best visited Sep-Nov or Mar-May. Average hotel $120-350/night.

title: Bangkok Street Food Capital
text: Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Chatuchak Weekend Market, street food tours, Chao Phraya river cruise, rooftop bars, Thai massage. Best visited Nov-Feb. Average hotel $30-200/night.

title: Budget Flight Tips
text: Book 6-8 weeks ahead for domestic, 2-3 months for international. Use flexible dates. Consider nearby airports and red-eye flights for savings.

title: Budget Accommodation Tips
text: Consider hostels, Airbnb, or boutique hotels outside city center. Book directly for best rates. Look for free breakfast and cancellation policies.

title: Luxury Stay Options
text: Five-star resorts with spa, concierge, airport transfers. Look for loyalty programs and package deals that bundle flights and hotels.

title: Adventure Activities
text: Scuba diving, zip-lining, hiking, surfing, parasailing. Book through certified operators with safety records. Travel insurance recommended.

title: Cultural Experiences
text: Guided museum tours, cooking classes, local market visits, historical walking tours, traditional performances. Book skip-the-line tickets in advance.

title: Travel Insurance Guide
text: Covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, lost luggage. Essential for international travel. Compare plans for coverage limits and exclusions.
